summary: Implemented 10 maintainability optimizations across site2rag pipeline: (1) annotated imports with terse sig+purpose comments; (2) terse 3-5 line file headers with export signatures; (3) noted parseHocr duplication in s3/s4 headers; (4) ERRORS blocks added to all stage headers; (5) CONFIG blocks added to all stage headers; (6) CLAUDE.md rewritten as strict tables; (7) error surface in ERRORS blocks; (8) D_* named config defaults in s1/s3/s4/s5/s6; (9) describe() comments in s1 and s3 test files; (10) ctx.run added to PipelineContext constructor via createToolRunner, removed from all stages (s1-s5), helper signatures updated to take ctx instead of run. Fixed vi.spyOn test compatibility by switching tool-runner.js to namespace import so spy replacements are picked up at runner-creation time. All 1367 tests pass.
